programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando uno de los antiguos casos de Tony se reabre, él intercambia roles con Gibbs para finalmente resolver el crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un agente compañero es asesinado, el equipo de NCIS se dirige al desierto para localizar a una mujer que podría tener la respuesta al misterio del asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La muerte de un boxeador lleva a Vance a pedir prestado al equipo de NCIS para comenzar a investigar el caso, mientras Gibbs indaga en el pasado de Vance.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un niño descubre un arma con la que alguien fue asesinado, toda la familia termina bajo investigación.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Con amigos como estos
programme.desc: El intento de Erin de condenar a un escurridizo jefe de la mafia por un antiguo asesinato se complica cuando su ex informante, Vincent (Dan Hedaya), deja la protección de testigos para proporcionarle una coartada a su antiguo jefe.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Traición
programme.desc: Danny se une a la búsqueda de dos fugitivos, siendo uno de ellos alguien a quien ayudó a encarcelar injustamente. Gormley critica un plan de Trey Delgado, un sargento de la policía de Nueva York que, según el, está teniendo una aventura con su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Juicio apresurado
programme.desc: Cuando Jamie es captado por la cámara cometiendo lo que podría interpretarse como brutalidad policial en una manifestación contra las políticas, Frank se ve obligado a entregar el caso a Asuntos Internos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando dos guardias de una prisión privada de máxima seguridad en Texas son asesinados, la UAC presiente que más de un sospechoso dentro de la prisión podría estar involucrado.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC es convocado a Wisconsin en busca de un asesino serial, el equipo busca una conexión entre las víctimas para encontrar pistas del sospechoso. Además, Kate tiene dificultades para lidiar con su sobrina, Meg, cuando comienza a comportarse mal.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la esposa de un prometedor congresista desaparece, la UAC investiga a sus enemigos políticos como posibles sospechosos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una familia de cuatro miembros es secuestrada durante unas vacaciones en Barbados, la UAC es convocada para asistir al jefe de la unidad Jack Garrett (Gary Sinise) y a su unidad internacional en su investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un niño descubre un arma con la que alguien fue asesinado, toda la familia termina bajo investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs tiene que dejar a un lado sus sentimientos personales y trabajar con Trent Kort, quien regresa para rastrear a un criminal peligroso.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Cops pursue a man skipping bail, an impaired driver is surprisingly cooperative, and officers struggle to remove a violent offender from a crime scene.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a threatening man with a weapon. A man gives officers a false name forgetting he’s wearing his name tag. A suspect in a stolen car collides with another vehicle then flees on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects flee an overturned auto, a man is accused of battery with a chain leash, and an unlucky gambler is dealt another losing hand by police when he decides to drive drunk.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos

programme.title: El fantástico mundo de Juan Orol

programme.title: José

programme.title: Qué pena tu vida
programme.desc: Un hombre inseguro y con el corazón roto, trata de recuperar a su último amor con la ayuda de su amigo fiel, tomando un camino de malas decisiones que lo llevan a comprenderse a sí mismo y a los demás.

programme.title: Las ruinas
programme.desc: "The Ruins" sigue a un grupo de amigos que se ven atrapados en una lucha brutal de supervivencia después de visitar una remota excavación arqueológica en la selva mexicana donde descubren un ser mortal entre las ruinas.

programme.title: Venganza diabólica
programme.desc: Un hombre conjura a un demonio aterrador llamado Pumpkinhead para llevar a cabo su venganza en contra de los adolescentes, quienes sin querer, mataron a su hijo.

programme.desc: La familia de psicópatas asesinos más peligrosa vuelve a la carga. Después de secuestrar a la DJ Vantia Block, deben enfrentarse a un policía texano que los persigue.

programme.title: Revelaciones
programme.desc: La esposa de un investigador universitario cree que su casa en el lago de Vermont está embrujada por un fantasma, o que está perdiendo la cabeza.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Una chica se enfrenta cara a cara con un espíritu que, después de mucho tiempo de tormento, ha estado buscando su regreso.

programme.title: Cementerio maldito
programme.desc: Basada en la aterradora novela de Stephen King. Después de que la familia Creed se muda a la zona rural de Maine, se topan con un antiguo cementerio con poderes siniestros.

programme.title: Sueño satánico
programme.desc: ¡Un niño se dedica a contar las historias... para distraer a una bruja del presente que quiere meterlo en el horno!

programme.title: Gunfight At The O.K. Corral

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: Dallas is a woman with a past who has been driven out of town by the high-minded ladies of the community. Lucy Mallory is the wife of a cavalry officer stationed in Lordsburg, and she's determined to be with him.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Cowboy Serenade
programme.desc: When a young man is sent to sell cattle to a packing plant, he is soon swindled by card sharks. Gene Autry is sent to investigate and recover the cattle, find the young man, and clear his name.

programme.title: Heart Of The Rio Grande
programme.desc: Gene Autry tames a spoiled teenage shrew sent to a Dude Ranch for the summer and in the process humanizes her father into being a better parent. Action includes stampeding horses, and a bold rescue!

programme.title: Home in Wyomin'
programme.desc: Radio star Gene Autry must solve a murder mystery at the Frontier Days pageant in Wyoming that involves a newspaper photographer, Chicago gangsters, a deserted mine, and a surprise ending.

programme.title: John Sturges' The Hallelujah Trail
programme.desc: Chaos reigns on the wide open plains as a host of stars, including Burt Lancaster and Lee Remick, have their eyes set on a shipment of whiskey and let loose in this wild comedy that spoofs nearly every convention of movie westerns.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: George Eastman is a poor young man determined to win a place in society and the heart of a beautiful socialite (Elizabeth Taylor). Shelley Winters plays the factory girl whose dark secret threatens Eastman’s professional and romantic prospects.

programme.title: The Night Of The Hunter
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum stars in an unforgettable role as a psychopathic preacher in relentless pursuit of two children who have their dead father's stolen fortune hidden in a doll. Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: Whoever Slew Auntie Roo?
programme.desc: Shelley Winters puts the Grande in Grande Dame Guignol in this atmospheric chiller! After the death of her daughter, Auntie Roo (Winters) has been looking for a 'dead ringer' replacement. And this time she found one...from the local orphanage!

programme.title: The Big Knife
programme.desc: Hollywood star Charlie Castle (Jack Palance) has it all... but no way out. When he tries to quit show business, his studio boss (Rod Steiger) blackmails him with a secret. Now, he could lose everything... including his soul! Shelley Winters co-stars.

programme.title: Kiss Me, Stupid
programme.desc: In this comic gem from the legendary Billy Wilder and his long-time writing partner I.A.L. Diamond, Dean Martin is a famous singer targeted by two would-be songwriters who encourage a waitress (Kim Novak) to coerce Dino into a song-buying mood.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard (1950)
programme.desc: Intense, enthralling, and unforgettable, Sunset Boulevard stars Gloria Swanson as Norma Desmond, a faded silent-movie star, and William Holden as Joe Gillis, a down-on-his-luck screenwriter whom she enlists to help her make her triumphant return.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is mad over the town's dirt road, especially when he finds out that the state set aside money over thirty years ago to fix it. Oliver goes to the Capitol to get the road paved but hits a roadblock when the Ziffels' house must be torn down.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney discovers an old wish book dating back to 1898 that tells the story of Calvin and Tessie Whittaker who once owned the Douglases' farm and how Calvin traveled to Hollywood to pitch his idea of putting a mouse named Dickey into films.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Sam Drucker does not stock any cosmetics in his store, much to the chagrin of Lisa. Lisa decides to set up a 'small' display in the store. When the merchandise is delivered, it forces Mr. Drucker to retreat to the front porch.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver plants his crops, worrying that they haven't been planted in time for a harvest. Lisa tries to be helpful and mixes up a batch of sour lemonade. Oliver pours out the bitter elixir in the newly planted field, with an unimaginable consequence.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver has been invited to give a speech at the Bar Association. He is there to advocate for the hiring of ex-convicts. He eventually ends up regretting his speech when he is forced to hire an ex-convict by the name of Willie Dunhill.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver goes to New York to finish up a case at his old firm. Meanwhile back on the farm, Lisa and Eb find a puppy left on the doorstep. Lisa, in all her innocence, leads Oliver to believe the puppy, affectionally named Freddie, is a human baby.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Hank Kimball proposes marriage to lady carpenter Ralph Monroe while under the influence of heavy medication. Lisa plans an amazing country wedding only to find out that, Sam, the Justice of the Peace, has forgotten to new his license.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver become alarmed that the youth of his beloved town, Hooterville is dwindling so he calls an emergency town meeting to prevent them from leaving. The next thing Oliver knows is that his barn has been volunteered for the new youth center.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa discover a root cellar under their house and become trapped when it collapses in on them. Their only hope to get rescued rides on a hilarious game of charades between Arnold the pig and Mr. Drucker.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie finds himself in a compromising situation with an attractive waitress after Edith ignores his amorous advances and dashes off to the Sunshine Home.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's priceless crystal bowl gets broken -- and there are three conflicting stories describing the accident.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: The biggest surprise at Walter's surprise birthday party is his arrest for 'lewd and lascivious' behavior. Walter's alibi is almost as embarrassing to him as the charge itself: he was stuffing himself with popcorn at a Donald Duck film festival.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Henry Fonda makes a rare television guest appearance when Maude decides he is an ideal candidate for President of the United States and starts the campaign without him, in the first half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude persists in spearheading a movement to draft Henry Fonda for President and has everyone around her convinced that she must be a manic-depressive in need of professional care.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude uses her position as director of Tuckahoe's Bicentennial musical extravaganza to create a tribute to American women -- a theme that hardly thrills Walter, Arthur, and the colonel in charge of the armory where the show is to be staged.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: A pretty girl has John in a whirl, and his determination to meet her prompts the taxi gang to come up with a surefire line that would unfreeze any woman on earth in Taxi.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The high-spirited taxi gang helps a jittery Bobby fight potential disappointment when he decides that he will end his stage career if he doesn’t get an acting job before midnight.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Mechanic Latka Gravas faces deportation unless he marries a U.S. citizen. The taxi gang comes to his rescue by pitching in and hiring a local working girl to be his bride.

programme.desc: Felix turns to Oscar for help after complaining he no longer can communicate with his daughter.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix plans a surprise birthday party for Oscar -who loathes birthday parties.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar tells Myrna the story of why Felix has been banned from Midtown Memorial Hospital ever since his daughter's birth in The First Baby.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Allen invites Oscar to be a celebrity contestant on his ABC show, and eager Felix persuades him to accept the offer and to take him along as his partner.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Crew,' a drug dealing gang from nearby Jackson bring violence and tragedy with them when they move into Sparta and start eliminating the competition. Harriet DeLong’s son Eugene witnesses the massacre of his childhood friend and a local dealer.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sparta is sent reeling from a wave of drug overdose cases as Gillespie and Tibbs close in on 'The Crew,' a murderous gang of crack dealers. Eugene bravely identifies the gang members that murdered his close friend, but now his own life is in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Old family conflicts resurface when Officer Luann Corbin's brother Tyler is released from prison and moves back home, driving a wedge between Luann, who thinks it’s a bad idea and that Tyler will never change, and her mother, who welcomes him.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Obsessed with his ex-girlfriend, a disturbed teenager kills her new boyfriend and pins the murder on her stepfather. Althea sees the teen’s hostility at school and realizes how dangerous he is. Can he be stopped from making one more fatal mistake?

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A killer and rapist is terrorizing the city, but Stone and Keller have almost no clues to lead them to the assailant.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A philandering professor is killed and his mistress is shot by a sniper who has been terrorizing a college campus.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone looks for the arsonists who set a fire that killed two firemen.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A rodeo rider is the prime suspect in his brother's murder.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A team of angry fathers, who are fed up with crime in their neighborhood, take a vigilante approach at solving the problem. During one of their rampages, a police informant is killed and the murder is blamed on the group.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A young man whom his associates know as Dan Turner arrives in Los Angeles, where he separates from them and boards a bus for Palmdale.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A young boy approaches Joe Mannix and offers him $1.85 to try to find a stamp album that the boy says he lost at an amusement arcade.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix goes to what he believes is a meeting with a new client, but is ambushed by a gunman who accuses him of working for Bruno Raphael, a former crime boss now exiled from the United States.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Two crop-dusting pilots who worked for orange grower Clint Carpenter have vanished without a trace. Joe Mannix is asked by his former military buddy, Dave Winters, who runs the crop-dusting service, to help solve the mystery of their disappearance.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While investigating the whereabouts of millions of embezzled money, Barnaby uncovers fraud, blackmail, and a couple of murders committed by a man who is supposed to be dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a strange twist of fate when millionaire William Bissell, checks into the hospital and stumbles upon his ex-lover, Nurse Jenny Morgan. After Bissell's found murdered by lethal injection, Jenny becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As a favor to a colleague, Dr. Sloan agrees to perform surgery on mafia kingpin Alfred Johnson. A supposed routine heart operation turns into an untimely death for The Don.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dying of gunshot wounds, private investigator Charlie Harper whispers one final cryptic message to Dr. Sloan. Intrigued, Sloan searches for the meaning of the dying man's last words with the aid of Charlie's secretary, Georgia.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Kill 'em with laughter. That's just what Bonnie Valin did when she murdered her husband with nitrous oxide or laughing gas.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's sister Dora is moving to town. She needs a place to stay overnight while her new home is fumigated; however, they soon discover that more than just bugs have been exterminated.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: In a grueling fight that leaves both competitors hospitalized, undefeated boxing legend, Mercury The Heat Jones loses the world middleweight title to Tommy Brackett.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Selected by Bravo Magazine as one of L.A.'s most eligible bachelors, Dr. Jack Stewart isn't aware the honor is dangerous to his health.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Amidst the corridors of Community General Hospital, the hit t.v. show The New Healers is shooting their next episode.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Refusing to believe that a long-time patient, Alex Forman, committed suicide, Dr. Sloan launches his own investigation.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: What could be more dangerous than a psychopathic killer with a taste for revenge! Eddie Gault, recently paroled, has only one thing on his mind--making Lt. Steve Sloan suffer for putting him in prison.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Searching for a new way to promote Community General, Norman Briggs decides to have the hospital sponsor a women's professional volleyball team.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's not just another day at the beach when an investigative reporter out for her daily swim drowns. The lifeguard, Rip, is blamed for the death despite his protests of innocence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A night school class in law draws Lieutenant Steve Sloan into another police investigation.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Though Mama doesn't have experience, she lands a job as a receptionist. She is fired because of constant distractions from her family whose problems she solves quickly once she returns home.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Buzz and Sonja are getting ready for Homecoming, and Vint tells Sonja she has to be home early because she is a girl. When an angry Sonja returns home late, she and Mama have a talk, and Mama defends her rights as a woman.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama runs into an an old flame, Woody Miller, who she is going out to dinner with. After dinner, the two go up to a cabin by the lake, against her family's wishes. She ends up going home the same day to the relief of her family.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Fran and Vint both have big nights which they are nervous about and ask Mama to iron clothes for them. Mama accidentally ruins Fran's dress and forgets to iron Vint's shirt because she isn't paying attention.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al is offered $50,000 dollars to reveal the identity of Jefferson, who is revealed to be a spy.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al loses his precious parking space after insulting a fat woman, which leads to "No Ma'am" seeking out to find a guru, Ironhead Haynes, and seek his advice.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Peggy must convince Al to come home for a "nooner" in order to win a big radio contest. Meanwhile, Bud and Kelly wait in a very long line to buy concert tickets.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al teaches Kelly about sports, so she can be on a sports trivia game show.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: When Al tries to change some batteries, the computer locks him inside a store. Meanwhile, Kelly and Bud celebrate Buck's birthday.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al's carpool, consisting of him and three models, is chosen to promote a campaign to clean up Chicago.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Al will get a new Viper for his Dodge if he lets people film a video of the Dodge crossing the 1 million mile mark. Meanwhile, Kelly tries to find Waldo.

programme.title: Married... With Children
programme.desc: Bud tries to find an old valentine, whose letter Kelly forgot to give him years ago. Meanwhile, Al shops for Valentine's Day gifts to give to Peggy.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: When Robbie saves a girl from being hit by a car, she tells him that she owes him her life... literally!

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie helps a stranded woman after her car runs out of gas but when she comes to the Douglas house to repay him, the family discovers that she's a famous African explorer!

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Robbie is accepted to college and wants to live in the dorms despite the family living five minutes from campus. But living alone is more lonely than Robbie expected.

programme.title: My Three Sons
programme.desc: Steve is surprised and uncomfortable when Chip refuses to get his long hair cut.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: Dennis decides to help along a potential romance between an older friend of his and a new girl in town.

programme.title: Dennis the Menace

programme.title: Dennis the Menace
programme.desc: The star player on Dennis' basketball team, Stretch, quits the team because Johnny Brady and some of the other players constantly make fun of him.

programme.title: Father Knows Best: Betty And The Jet Pilot
programme.desc: Betty is saddened when her new boyfriend, who is a jet pilot, is transferred to Alaska.

programme.title: Family Affair
programme.desc: The vice principal and a child psychologist are concerned that Buffy and Jody only spend time with each other instead of playing with the other children, and state that it would be better for them to spend less time together.

programme.title: Family Affair

programme.title: Family Affair

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A forensic dentist helps police nab a child killer by showing that the teeth marks on the killer's arms match the teeth of the murdered boy. And telltale blood stains on a blue bandana solve the 10-year-old case of a teenage girl murdered.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: DNA found on a marijuana joint in Florida in 2005 helps to solve the 1988 rape and murder of a California woman. And a cold case of murder in Illinois heats up when a jailhouse lawyer turns jailhouse snitch.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police run down more than 11,000 leads before coming up with a suspect in the murders of three Virginia girls, and the abduction and strangulation of a California woman continue to baffle the investigators more than 11 years after the crime.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Forty-one years after the crime, a woman implicates her brother and cousin in the murder of a policeman.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Easter Sunday of 1992, the body of missing woman Lisa Ziegert is found in a field. The investigation yields hundreds of leads but no true suspect. After more than two decades on ice, the case is revived.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Cops finally close in on a serial killer with the help of the Internet. And a drug trafficker jumps bail goes into the bike shop business and helps pioneer the sport of mountain biking while he's on the lam.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 13-year-old Jennifer Bastian is abducted and murdered in August of 1986, residents of Tacoma panic. This is the second young girl killed in five months. Convinced a predator is loose, Police embark on a 32-year inquiry.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: This is the story of the hunt for one of the most notorious serial killers in American history--the BTK killer. After committing at least seven brutal murders he vanished for over 25 years before sending clues of his crimes to the media in 2004.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A highly-regarded California arson investigator is suspected of setting a series of fires, and in Texas, a man is convicted of raping and murdering his 68-year-old neighbor.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A murderer's saliva, found on envelopes, helps seal his doom 37 years after his first killing. And Colorado police crack a cold case 24 years later when they take a DNA sample from the victim's son that proves that his father murdered his mother.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A detective vows not to shave until he solves the murder of a young Oregon woman. It takes three years and a string of Mexican Mafia informants to crack the case and allow the dedicated detective to shave his beard.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A dry cleaning tag inside a sweatshirt left at a crime scene helps police track down a serial killer and rapist who had been eluding them for years.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a 15-year-old girl is found murdered in her grandparents' home. For decades, a stalled investigation only fuels the town rumor mill, pointing an accusing finger at her 13-year-old sister.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: We follow Det. Vince Velazquez of Atlanta and Capt. Russell Popham of East Point, Ga., as they work to solve the 1995 rape and murder of 14-year-old Nacole Smith, one of Atlanta's most notorious unsolved crimes.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: While South Park Elementary is attempting to stage a non-denominational holiday play that won't offend (or entertain) anyone, Kyle checks himself into the South Park mental asylum.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: While Mr. Garrison deserts the class for a visit to Tom's Rhinoplasty, Stan, Kyle, Kenny, and Cartman all compete for the attention of Ms. Ellen, the new substitute teacher.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The boys' discovery of a prehistoric relic spawns a monster that threatens to destroy South Park and the world.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Who is Eric Cartman's father? It could be anyone who attended South Park's 12th Annual Drunken Barn Dance.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Nellie Bly and Elizabeth Bisland try to travel around the world in under 80 days, and Thomas Nast's political cartoons lead to the downfall of Tammany Hall leader "Boss" Tweed. Featuring Michael Cera, Ellie Kemper, Natasha Leggero and Jason Alexander.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Kentucky Daisy stakes a claim to land, Gordon Cooper overcomes mechanical issues on a one-man space mission, and African-American Deputy Marshal Bass Reeves is the inspiration for the Lone Ranger. Featuring Kat Dennings, Colin Hanks and Jaleel White.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Milton Bradley popularizes board games, Roger Sharpe helps overturn a pinball ban, and chess master Bobby Fischer defeats Russian rival Boris Spassky during the Cold War. Featuring Topher Grace, Zach Gilford, Taran Killam and Jake Johnson.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Popé leads the Pueblo Indians in a revolt, Boy Scouts founder Ernest Thompson Seton tracks a wolf, and the truth behind the Roswell UFO conspiracy is revealed. Featuring Colin Hanks, Jason Mantzoukas, Rob Huebel, Tom Lennon and Patton Oswalt.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Alexander Graham Bell steals the original design for the telephone from Elisha Gray, and Thomas Edison tries to create a movie-making monopoly. Featuring Parker Posey, Chris Parnell, Jason Ritter, Martin Starr, Michael McKean and Henry Winkler.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: J.T. McWilliams forms a community but is muscled out by William Clark, Bugsy Siegel bets his life on the Flamingo Casino, and the Moulin Rouge is the first casino to break the color barrier. Featuring Sam Rockwell, Donald Faison, and Dennis Quaid.

programme.desc: When Ms. Barch assigns lab partners for a behavioral science project, Daria is paired with disinterested jock Kevin, and Brittany is paired with the sleazy Upchuck.

programme.title: Daria

programme.title: Daria

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.desc: Es el día del infierno: los planes de Vinnie para robar un pequeño caballo para un granjero se tuercen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With two suspended vets, the team must re-block their formations for their Hall Of Fame performance. New vets step up as a new point of the triangle is named. The rookie candidates try to get their footing during this never seen before rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 23 veterans travel to Canton, Ohio to perform at Jerry Jones' induction to the Pro Football Hall of Fame. All eyes are watching as the DCC perform for the NFL elite.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp winds down the pressure skyrockets. No one wants to be sent home now. The ladies start to crack under the pressure. Another one is sent home. Will this be the final cut?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli announces the official squad and the women realize the hard-fought dream of becoming a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Full of excitement and nerves, the squad prepares for their very first football game at AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of eager hopefuls -- ranging from starry-eyed rookies to experienced NFL cheerleaders -- gather at AT&T Stadium for a shot at joining the world's most famous squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 125 remaining hopefuls must nail a choreographed routine before advancing to the final rounds, and the DCC veterans reveal their plans for the future.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A former Laker Girl who survived the Las Vegas shooting chases her dream, and the women work on their solo presentations and interviews as finals approach.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The returning veterans travel to the Bahamas to shoot the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders swimsuit calendar, and the rookies feel the pressure as training camp begins.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The first-year hopefuls get new looks on Rookie Makeover Day, DCC alumni give the candidates feedback, and Cowboys' Head Coach Jason Garrett stops by during a rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Before Kelli and Judy make roster cuts, the rookies learn the famed kickline and jump splits, get fitted for the iconic uniform and face Jay Johnson's power squad training.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winning choreographer Travis Wall tests the hopefuls' contemporary dance skills, Kelli and Judy make show group selections, and Melissa Rycroft teaches injury prevention.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A veterinary technician chases her dream, Kelli has an uncomfortable conversation about an applicant's weight, and the women explore their new city.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Some candidates struggle to adapt to the larger stage when they finally hit the field to learn the DCC entrance, and Miranda is unnerved by criticism of her hair.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With so many strong candidates, Kelli realizes some of the cuts may not be dance-based, and media simulation day proves to be problematic for a few of the candidates.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a determined investigator works with a prosecutor in hope of solving a 20-year-old murder case, a dark secret is uncovered.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman comes forward with the truth about the deaths of three other women, solving a 17-year-old mystery; interviews with two people at the center of the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Kentucky man is convicted of murdering his co-worker; the mystery is considered solved until a stunning disclosure years later turns the closed case upside down.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a mother of five is found dead in her bedroom, her family believes a crazed killer is to blame.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After losing a hotly contested custody battle, a woman disappears with her 11-month-old daughter; the child's father searches four continents for almost two decades before reaching an emotional conclusion.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An advocate for missing and murdered Indigenous women searches for answers in the disappearance of her niece and exposes cracks in law enforcement.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance tears her young children apart; a sting operation catches an unlikely villain.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Jacksonville, Fla., firefighter discovers a disturbingly violent scene in his darkened bedroom on a Halloween weekend.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: An intruder breaks into a lawyer's home, murders his wife and blinds him; in a search for the truth, the lawyer questions his troubled son as a possible suspect.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The father of an Alabama teenager calls the police after he returns home to find his son had thrown a party, leaving the place trashed; 11 minutes after the deputy leaves the house, another 911 call is placed reporting a shooting at the residence.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A couple goes on a scuba-diving vacation in the British Virgin Islands; on the final dive of the trip, one of them surfaces -- but the other does not.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A look at the case of con man John Meehan, including interviews with his wife and her daughter, his ex-wife, law enforcement officers, and the Los Angeles Times reporter who shined a spotlight on the story.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Against all odds, a young woman is found alive after an attack on her and a friend near Corpus Christi, Texas.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mother is found dead in a house fire, but an autopsy reveals a brutal murder; the case goes cold for years until a shocking confession is made.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: 11 children, three bedrooms, one bathroom and not much money to get by. The Lange household is truly packed to the rafters. Strict Mum Leanne truly believes she could be Australia's best Mum.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Ash and James are the true definition of city living, millennial parents -online-obsessed, technology-obsessed. The Hagar family are slow-paced, old fashioned, off the grid organic farmers

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Penina's sole focus in life is to save money and pay off the mortgage. Kellie and Brendon prioritise fun family experiences over anything and everything.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Cassie and Michael are highly-disciplined, no-nonsense, militant like parents. Alise and Todd are parents of unruly, wreckless, out of control quadruplet boys.

programme.title: Wife Swap Australia
programme.desc: Goal-driven Mum Tenille is highly-successful, extremely wealthy and big believers in education. Hippie Mum Angeline lives on a bus with her 8 children, They have no structure, no routine and no money.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Don't Threaten Me with a Good Time
programme.desc: Bret Michaels, lead singer of rock band Poison, welcomes 25 young ladies to his rocker lair in the hopes of finding that one special girl he can call his own.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Talk Dirty to Me
programme.desc: With 16 girls all fighting for Bret's affection, tensions are run high and alliances are formed as the ladies try to eliminate each other from the competition for Bret's heart, it's “Good Girls” versus “Bad Girls”.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Motocross
programme.desc: Bret challenges the twelve remaining girls to put the pedal to the metal in a motocross relay race, as they learn to ride, they fall, nearly run people over, and even lose an acrylic nail or two.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Riff it Good
programme.desc: Bret wants a woman with a creative side, so he splits the remaining 10 women in teams of 2 for a music challenge, where the girls write lyrics to one of Bret's tracks then perform the song on stage.

programme.title: Rock of Love: First Annual Bret's Mudbowl
programme.desc: Eight girls remain and Bret wants to see who's willing to get down-n-dirty for him in the First Annual Bret's Mudbowl!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Tour Bus Challenge
programme.desc: The next test is The Tour Bus Challenge where the ladies compete in various challenges all relating to the life on the road, the winner getting a solo date.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Show Me Your Hits
programme.desc: This week Bret has arranged for his remaining “sexy six” to shoot an album cover for his latest release.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Leo and Alli are getting to feel really serious. Distraught Drew needs to visit camp for comfort. Maya must show up Zoë and puts an expensive dress on her mother's credit card… nothing could possibly go wrong, right? !

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As summer comes to an end, Becky tries to understand the meaning behind an unexpected tragedy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After the devastating loss of Adam, the Degrassi students try their best to move on but when it's your brother… And fitting in is hard for Zoë because she's never just been a normal girl. Alli reunites with Leo on her home turf.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew does his best as Degrassi President but without sleep, he's not much good. By Drew's side, Zoë becomes the first lady of Degrassi. Leo does damage control and tries to get in with Alli's friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The opportunity to write for a real-life magazine is offered to Clare but her brain after cancer is not cooperating.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare tries to concoct any excuse to save her reputation with the magazine but doesn’t want to play the cancer card.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Focusing more on her music than Miles, Maya lets Zoë talk her into making a sexy music video.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miles helps Maya discover who is behind her video going viral. Maya's hellbent on revenge, getting her into hot water.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Student council prez Drew is psyched about his Degrassi TV interview but when the story sheds a negative light, Drew’s stunned.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is excited to have Bianca back in town for Thanksgiving but is surprised when she isn't as forthcoming as he expected.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Alli’s birthday, but all she can think about is Leo being sent back to France.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alli is still lying to protect Leo, but her stories are beginning to unravel. Maya shows her rubber room classmates that she isn’t a princess.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew attempts juggling his new job and his new girl. To forget about Leo, Alli focusses on her science experiment. After getting thrown out of class for forgetting to wear a bra, Imogen plans a scathing piece for Degrassi TV.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Failing at balancing his life, Drew decides he has to break up with Zoë. Alli partners up with Dallas in an attempt to stay focused on her science experiment. Imogen takes her dress code fight online, but what does she really want to achieve?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A shocking discovery leads Miles to question his family life. Eli is slipping away, and Clare finds herself growing closer to Drew. Dallas wants to be with Alli, but the truth about her relationship with Leo could send him over the edge.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miles is determined to out his father’s secrets, but he may not be ready for the whole truth.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With rumours swirling about Zoë’s drunken adventures at a recent party, Becky files a DTV report about teen girls and alcohol.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky wants to put things right after making a false accusation about Zoë's assault. But once she discovers the truth and sees how deeply this is affecting everyone, Becky questions if she's doing the right thing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya tries to help Zig out of a tough situation. Jenna sets her sights on winning the semi-formal king and queen crowns with Connor. Becky worries she will lose Imogen as a friend when new student Jack arrives.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky tries to get back in bestie rhythm with Imogen at the semi-formal, but is there more to their relationship than friendship?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Dallas feels he's being racially profiled after he and Connor are held for questioning in connection with a terror incident.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tristan confronts Mr. Yates about his harsh Drama class criticisms and finds out the shocking truth behind them.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Zoë lands her dream role, it hits a little too close to home following her assault. Clare has some tough decisions to make as she searches for a date to Wild Wild West Night. Miles focuses on settling the score with Zig.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fireworks begin at Wild Wild West Night when Clare makes her decision known with regards to Drew and Eli. Zoë struggles to stand up for herself. Miles and Zig face off in a showdown for Maya's heart.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya is doing her best to keep Zig safe but when she snoops and finds a bag of drugs, her worst fears are confirmed. Winston is on the prowl for his first ladyfriend when he realizes the perfect girl has been right under his nose for years.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the ophthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the Leaellynasaura and the Tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is going large as he focuses on the biggest animals to have ever walked the earth. In his dino-den, he starts by meeting the Argentinosaurus, an animal so large that even its poo was deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic was home to the most vicious and violent predators the world has ever seen. To survive, herbivores had to fight back. Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve tries to chomp through a car like a T. rex, wield an axe like an Allosaurus and hitch a ride in Britain's biggest tank to showcase the might of a Spinosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve gets freaky on a mission to find the weirdest dinosaur ever. He kick-starts with a Gigantoraptor, an 8-metre tall giant that laid the biggest eggs in history.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve discovers just what it takes to be a terror from the skies. He straps himself into one of Britain's fastest wind tunnels where he goes head-to-head against Microraptor.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve travels to new depths as he discovers just what it takes to be an aquatic terror. His quest sees him rocket through water in spectacular style, just like an Ophthalmosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve's on a mission to find dinosaurs that have something a little special: fearsome killers, with incredible abilities! Get ready for a sensory sensation! His quest sees him race in the dark like a Troodon.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is on the hunt for the most deadly animals to have ever walked the earth, dinosaurs. Steve goes on a mission to uncover what was deadlier than the dinosaurs, from monsoons and super-sized sandstorms to ballistic bacteria and gory gas.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall looks back at the most awesome experiments over the series and chooses his highlights.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five-year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa's wedding is only three days away, but Dog is thinking about bounties, not bouquets. A hot bounty comes in and Dog wants to go on the hunt. When the ladies object, Dog explains his decision, "We're a family of hunters, we need to hunt."

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a brother bondsman from Washington State calls Dog for help tracking a runner in search of fun in the sun on the tropical paradise of Kauai, the team gets on the case. Dog's only problem? No leads!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. While studying the fugitive's file, the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment, they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things get stressful when Dog and the team race to Honolulu International to catch a felon who's booked on an afternoon flight to Florida owing $140,000 to a bondsman.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: No one becomes a bondsman overnight and even the members of Dog's team know there is always more to learn. So when Duane Lee cuts a felon a little too much slack about checking-in and then goes missing, Duane Lee knows he's gonna get schooled.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What starts out as a perfect day for Dog turns ugly fast. He and Beth are enjoying helping their kids learn how to care for their new pets, when duty calls for a tough case. The charges: alleged cruelty to animals.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in, it's a tough job, but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After Dog's son-in-law, Travis, signs off on an iffy bond and the accused turns into a fugitive, Dog and Beth decide to bring Travis on his first bounty. What better way to teach him than to show him just how hard it can be to bring in your man!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following Sean's death, Alexis is comforted by Dex's solace and friendship, as the two renew their passionate love for each other; Jeff and Sammy Jo are horrified to find her diary and a dead body in the water.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Enjoying his time with Krystle in Dayton, Blake remains perplexed by the case of her memory lapses.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake gives Jeff one-third controlling interest in Denver-Carrington, postponing Adam's plans to gain sole control of the company; Blake and Krystle meet with Dr. Hampton to begin tests, while Blake tells her the true reason for her severe headaches.

programme.desc: Interpreting Alexis' vendetta against Blake as a love/hate relationship, Dex tells Alexis he is through being taken for granted by her; Sammy suspects Virginia may not be as naive as she wants people to think.

programme.desc: Krystle's operation is unsuccessful and she slips into a coma. Told she will probably never recover, a grieving Blake returns to Denver; Sammy Jo is attacked by an unknown assailant; Dex discovers Joanna is a link to Alexis' controller, Heath.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fearing that his darkest secret will be revealed because of the search for Roger Grimes's murderer, Blake vows to take the rap to put an end to the investigation; Dex and Sable both go after Heath.

programme.desc: Sammy Jo recognizes Gibson as the man Krystle saw in her nightmares, and Blake vows to protect his family secret with his life; Adam discovers Virginia's secret past; Blake entrusts Dex with documents relating to their family's secret.

programme.desc: Alexis hires a mercenary to get her ships back; Adam and Jeff exchange blows after he accuses Adam of being disloyal to Blake; Dex begins to doubt Alexis can ever offer him the kind of love he needs.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: After Pac and his friends defeat all the ghosts, Betrayus clones an army of Netherworld monsters.

programme.title: Stardog and Turbocat

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While the Ninja fight to save MegaMonster Amusement Park, Jay struggles to defend his family's home from the Vermillion Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Wolves are still stealing Chi, and everyone else has very little. When a load of CHI falls into the Gorge of Eternal Depth, Laval, Eris and Gorzan must try to retrieve it.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles taken prisoners by the Wolves. Laval determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris, and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue.… but something about ShadoWind isn’t quite right.

programme.desc: Nova sends out an S.O.S. that has the dream chasers rushing to her rescue and straight into a trap!

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: Our heroes have no choice but to ask The Undreamnt to help them in their fight against D-Shock and the Happy App.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: The dream chasers are faced with the Brain's Final Protocol, to box the dream world for all of eternity.

programme.title: LEGO Dreamzzz
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation,Z-Blob,follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn,Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real,and in danger!

programme.desc: Oz takes the dream chasers to Castle Nocturnia to meet Grand Inspector Royce. Zoey heads to the Grim Realm to confront the Night Hunter and the rest of the team consults the enigmatic Sandman.

programme.desc: El Abuelo entra en el mundo de la actuación y Peluzín es arrestado.

programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Las noticias anuncian que un meteorito chocará contra la tierra, acabando con todos los seres vivientes. Los Del Barrio se preparan para el Apocalipsis.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia del Barrio se va de vacaciones a Acapulco, invitados por Gaspar. Después de una gran borrachera en el Baby'O, el abuelo amanece en la casa de Acapulco Shore.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.desc: When a company that owes money to Charles becomes bankrupt, Charlies ends up deep in debt and puts a lot of financial strain on the family.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary's failing eyes end up causing issues with her schoolwork; when Charles gets her glasses, her class begins to tease her for them.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The town gathers for a baseball match between the Green-Stockings of Sleepy Eye and the men of Walnut Grove.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Widow Snider (Bonnie Bartlett) scheme to get dates for the spring dance.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A dying widow (Patricia Neal) asks the Ingalls to help find homes for her children.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When it appears the widow's children must be separated, Mr. Edwards makes an announcement.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs. Oleson complicates the Ingallses' long-awaited camping vacation by deciding that she and her family should go along.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura thinks she has found gold and imagines the glamorous life it can buy.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Mary's plans to raise money for the pastor's birthday by investing the Sunday-school funds backfire.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children work together to make a bird house. They are happy to learn that the bird will have lots of company; many animals make their homes in the park too!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind by his insect friends and family, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney's excited to find out that Rusty's family is adopting a new baby girl from China; however, Rusty feels differently. He's not sure if he's going to be a good brother, and he doesn't know much about China.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma can't play with her friends because she has to complete a school project about her family. Before you know it, Barney brings Emma on a trip to Venice to learn more about her great granddad.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and BJ are helping the park kids get ready for a school play. When Barney tells everyone that putting on shows began in Greece, they want to go visit! While there, they meet some friends and decide to put on a play in an amphitheatre.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids are having a yard sale, getting rid of old toys, books and clothes. Kioko shows up holding a prized possession—a music box from Switzerland. By accident, Ben includes the music box in a cardboard box of yard sale items!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When the kids find a mysterious, colorful egg in the park, Barney takes them on a trip to Kenya to try to find out what kind of animal could have laid the egg.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney takes the kids to Hawaii on a quest for a bird of paradise. While there, they meet some friends, learn new Hawaiian words, make a Hawaiian lei and dance a hula! Eventually, Barney and his friends find a bird of paradise.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's Earth Day, a great time for everyone to learn how to help take car of our world, but Ben is wasting paper while BJ isn't too concerned about cutting down a tree to make room for a new playground.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A day of imaginative play and fun for Barney and his young friends is kicked off by the arrival of a variety of boxes from the "Enjoy-Your-Toys Company." Surprisingly, every box is empty!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Deep Dive Australia

programme.title: Wild Workers

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The giant children fly into a mysterious rage, and Chopper discovers the true reason for their unusual condition! Meanwhile, Zoro, Brook, and Sanji cross paths with a dangerous duo!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Trafalgar Law finds trouble in the form of an old acquaintance, Chopper investigates the Master's lab, and the mysterious Samurai shows what he can do with a full body!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Mientras nuestros héroes caminan por la campiña, notan un anuncio de "Personas desaparecidas" con un rostro innegablemente conocido: ¡es exactamente igual que James del Equipo Rocket! ¿De verdad es él el del anuncio?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes discuten el rumor de que un raro Farfetch’d salvaje ha sido visto en el área. Tanto Ash como Misty prometen atraparlo, ¡y pronto tienen su oportunidad cuando el Pokémon aparece!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Al dejar el Centro Pokémon, nuestros héroes discuten lo que creen que saldrá del huevo Pokémon que Ash descubrió. Cerca, el Equipo Rocket comienza a empollar otro atrevido plan para hacerlo suyo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En una batalla con el Rhyhorn de otro Entrenador, el bulbo en la espalda de Bulbasaur empieza a brillar. Ash lo lleva al Centro Pokémon del lugar. Pronto descubren que Bulbasaur no está enfermo, ¡se prepara para evolucionar!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En su camino hacia la Isla Cinnabar, nuestros héroes se unen con la Oficial Jenny y con el Growlithe de la fuerza policíaca en un entrenamiento especial, esperando mejorar las habilidades de batalla de Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: En un breve descanso para almorzar, Ash y sus amigos conocen a Todd Snap, un fotógrafo Pokémon que intenta conseguir una toma perfecta de Pikachu.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que hace tiempo que no gana ninguna Medalla de Gimnasio, Ash se inscribe al Examen de Admisión de la Liga Pokémon, ¡una gran oportunidad para demostrar que puede convertirse en un Maestro Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y los chicos deciden visitar un centro de crianza que vieron en un comercial. Sin embargo, el centro encubre un plan diabólico de los miembros del Equipo Rocket, Butch y Cassidy, ¡viejos rivales de Jessie y James!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
